<ls -la /skills />

→ Red Team: Metasploit & Wireshark ✔️ → Networks Fundamental ✔️ Web: OWASP Top 10 & Burp Suite✔️ → OSINT : Maltego & theHarvester✔️ →Scripting : Bash & Python (Entry level)✔️

<nano about.txt />

I am a Pentester passionate about offensive cybersecurity, with experience in penetration testing, vulnerability analysis, and system exploitation I specialize in using tools like Burp Suite, Nmap, Metasploit, and Wireshark, in addition to developing scripts in Python and Bash to automate audits I am always constantly learning, exploring new ethical hacking techniques and methodologies such as OWASP, MITRE ATT & CK and PTES I look for challenges that allow me to grow professionally and strengthen the security of organizations through proactive evaluations 🚀

_
